# Taimi — The AI Market Intelligence

Pricing comparison data for agentic AI coding tools. Curated by Kanto Company.

## API

Static JSON, no auth, CORS enabled, CC BY 4.0.

- All tools: https://taimi.market/v1/tools.json
- Single tool: https://taimi.market/v1/tools/<tool>.json
- Price change log: https://taimi.market/v1/changelog.json

## Schema essentials

- Currency: USD, all prices monthly (no-commitment)
- Plan categories: free, individual, team, enterprise, usage
- Overage units: token (per 1M), request (per call), acu (agent compute minutes)
- base_price.per: user (per seat), team/flat (flat monthly)
- platform_plan: true means the price covers a broader platform, not just the coding tool

## Caveats

- Usage-based units are NOT comparable across vendors. Tokens, requests, and ACUs measure fundamentally different things.
- Enterprise plans with null base_price are "contact sales" — no public price.
- Annual billing discounts are noted in plan notes, not in base_price.amount.

## Attribution

Data licensed CC BY 4.0. Attribute to Kanto Company when using.
